label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's find out how long the experiment lasted according to the text. The passage says that the participants were assigned to write for 20 minutes per day for three consecutive days. Then it mentions that two weeks after the third day of writing, all participants received a skin biopsy. The wounds were photographed regularly over the following days and on the 11th day after the biopsy, the wounds had completely healed. So, the writing part of the experiment lasted about three days. The two weeks before the biopsy is the time after the experiment. The 11 days after the biopsy is the healing period, which is
